title: Supporting information
description: Information to help you complete your paper tax return or tax return supplement.

child_links.title: Amounts that you do not pay tax on 2012
child_links.description: Information about those amounts that you do not pay tax on.

child_links.title: Special circumstances and glossary 2012
child_links.description: Special circumstances affecting how your tax is calculated and a glossary of terms used in the tax return instructions.

child_links.title: Referred publications 2011-12
child_links.description: You may need to refer to some of these publications and rulings to prepare your 2011-12 tax return.

child_links.title: Checklist - tax return 2012
child_links.description: Complete the tax return checklist to avoid any delays when you lodge your paper tax return.

child_links.title: Checklist - supplement 2012
child_links.description: Complete the supplementary checklist to make sure you have completed your supplementary tax return before lodgment.

child_links.title: Telecom Corporation of New Zealand Limited demerger (2011-12)
child_links.description: Impact on resident individual shareholders, including capital gains tax consequences and examples.

child_links.title: UXC Limited - 2011-12 return of capital
child_links.description: Find out the tax consequences for shareholders who received a return of capital on their UXC shares.

child_links.title: Key events for Australian shareholders 2011-12
child_links.description: Contains links to documents about large company transactions which may impact a large number of individual taxpayers.

child_links.title: Individual tax return instructions FAQs
child_links.description: The TaxPack instructions has been streamlined. These FAQs may address some questions you have.
